active_tasks_found: POSITION_SIDE_SEMANTICS_MERGE_FIX_001 (ACTIVE — task JSON confirmed, prerequisite POSITION_SIDE_SEMANTICS_REGRESSION_AUDIT_001 APPROVED)

fix_1_render_unified_positions.location: dashboard.html renderUnifiedPositions() — formerly line 1139, now lines 1139-1167
fix_1_render_unified_positions.new_code: latestOpenPaperPositions = openPaperPositions.map(p => { const cached = markMap.get(p.market_slug); if (!cached) return p; return { ...p, current_price, current_price_stale, unrealized_pnl_usd, live_equity_usd, best_bid, best_ask, spread, source_ts, mark_source, game_status, inning, inning_half, outs, balls, strikes, home_score, away_score, game_source_ts, game_stale, game_source }; });
fix_1_render_unified_positions.old_behavior: Full-object spread from markMap overwrote ALL fields of the new trade object with whatever was cached for that market_slug. When a trade closed and a new trade opened on the same slug with a different side (e.g., BUY_NO closed → BUY_YES opened), the cached old position's side/backed_team/faded_team permanently corrupted the new trade's display. The corruption self-perpetuated across every render cycle until a page reload.
fix_1_render_unified_positions.new_behavior: Only 20 named safe dynamic fields are copied from the mark cache (current_price, current_price_stale, unrealized_pnl_usd, live_equity_usd, best_bid, best_ask, spread, source_ts, mark_source, game_status, inning, inning_half, outs, balls, strikes, home_score, away_score, game_source_ts, game_stale, game_source). Trade identity fields remain authoritative from the fresh openPaperPositions object built from the current trades API response.

fix_2_games_tab_slug_mismatch.location: dashboard.html renderGamesTab() — formerly line 1441, now lines 1469-1475
fix_2_games_tab_slug_mismatch.old_code: const openBySlug = new Map((openPositions || []).map(p => [p.market_slug, p]));  // keyed by 'mlb-tex-lad-2026-04-10'
fix_2_games_tab_slug_mismatch.new_code: const openBySlug = new Map((openPositions || []).map(p => [(p.market_slug || '').replace(/-\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/, ''), p]));  // keyed by 'mlb-tex-lad'
fix_2_games_tab_slug_mismatch.old_behavior: openBySlug was keyed by the full date-stamped slug (e.g. 'mlb-tex-lad-2026-04-10'). The lookup keys constructed from ESPN game data were date-free (e.g. 'mlb-tex-lad'). These NEVER matched, so open positions were never found in the Games tab — the 'OPEN POSITION' badge, the position sort bubble-up, and the 'Backed/Unrealized' box were all permanently hidden.
fix_2_games_tab_slug_mismatch.new_behavior: Both openBySlug and advisoryBySlug strip the date suffix before keying, using the same regex /-\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/ applied to replace(). Slugs without a date suffix are unaffected (replace is a no-op). The lookup keys constructed below from ESPN data are also date-free, so they now match. Open positions will correctly appear in the Games tab with the 'OPEN POSITION' badge and position detail box.

exact_sections_changed: renderUnifiedPositions() — line 1139 full-object spread replaced with 20-field specific merge
renderGamesTab() — openBySlug and advisoryBySlug key construction now strips date suffix
verification_summary.old_behavior_renderUnifiedPositions: Full spread { ...p, ...(markMap.get(slug) || {}) } — all cached fields including stale side/backed_team overwrite new trade
verification_summary.new_behavior_renderUnifiedPositions: Field-specific merge — only mark/price/game-state fields copied; side/backed_team/faded_team always come from fresh buildOpenPaperPositions result
verification_summary.old_behavior_renderGamesTab: openBySlug keyed by 'mlb-tex-lad-2026-04-10'; lookup key 'mlb-tex-lad' — never matched
verification_summary.new_behavior_renderGamesTab: Both keys are now date-free 'mlb-tex-lad' — match confirmed

restart_notes: No restart needed. dashboard.html is a static file served by dashboard_server.py on every page request. A browser hard-refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) on the dashboard will load the patched JS. The running dashboard_server.py process does not need to be restarted.
summary: Replaced the full-object spread in renderUnifiedPositions() with a 20-field specific mark merge so stale cache can never overwrite side/backed_team/faded_team, and fixed the renderGamesTab slug-key mismatch by stripping date suffixes so open positions now appear in the Games tab.
